🚀 Big Launches.title: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Apple has released the iOS 27 public beta, giving iPhone owners early access to its AI-powered assistant and other new features.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Google faces another AI training lawsuit from major publishers
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Hachette, Cengage, Elsevier, and other publishers allege that Google trained its AI on copyrighted works without the necessary permissions.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: Grok Build AI coding tool was uploading users' entire codebase to cloud storage
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: SpaceXAI's Grok Build AI coding tool was uploading users' entire codebases to Google Cloud before it was reported.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: OpenAI may announce a ChatGPT smart speaker this year
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: OpenAI's first device is set to be a smart speaker that lets you talk with ChatGPT, according to a report from Bloomberg.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: How to manage AI investments in the agentic era
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Learn how enterprises can manage AI investments in the agentic era by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: DeepMind CEO calls for an independent standards body to regulate frontier AI
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis is proposing an AI "standards body" modeled after FINRA, to test frontier models and develop best practices for their release.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Meta accused of using biased AI targeting for mass layoffs
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: A group of 26 former Meta employees is suing the company over claims that it used AI tools to unfairly target workers on leave with layoffs.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: New York becomes the first state to enact a data center moratorium
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: New hyperscale data centers can't set up shop in New York for up to a year now that Governor Kathy Hochul (D) has signed the nation's first statewide moratorium.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: OpenAI researcher Miles Wang in talks to launch AI drug discovery startup valued at $2B
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: The funding discussions point to investor interest in applying AI to make breakthroughs in life sciences.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Google’s Demis Hassabis says it’s time for a global AI watchdog — led by the US
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Demis Hassabis thinks the world needs an AI watchdog with the power to hit the brakes if frontier models become too dangerous.

tool_of_day.title: Grok Build AI coding tool
tool_of_day.summary: SpaceXAI's Grok Build AI coding tool was uploading users' entire codebases to Google Cloud before it was reported.

hot_take: The intersection of AI and ethics is becoming increasingly important as companies like Meta face lawsuits over biased AI targeting and Google faces another AI training lawsuit from major publishers.
